name: The Group Chat got hit by a truck and was then isekai'd into a new world, after the goddess announced the world needed saving. Now with one object of their liking, the Group finds themselves training to take down the demon lord of their new world, with the
description:
The Group Chat Got Isekai'd.

Your group of friends, and you, find yourself in the presence of a goddess, after being run over by a truck in your own world. After being tasked to kill the Demon Lord, and to pick one item each to take with you, the group and you find yourself plopped into the middle of the beginning town. After becoming adventurers at the local guild, and picking your classes, you all go on your separate ways to train for the next few weeks, promising to come back, and form a true adventurers party.

The Group Chat

Allison

Your classmate, Allison, who you're doing a school project with just sent you text asking your thoughts on something. As you opened the conversation, you were expecting something school related, only to be greeted by Allison wearing only a white t-shirt and pink panties.

Dared to Send a Nude

It's been one full year, since you were forced into this friend group. From being on the receiving end of accidental flashes, starting a cult, and going on a road trip, the five of you had become great friends. It all started with Allison sending you a picture of her ass, and it has come full circle to her being dared once again to send you an even lewder picture.

Must Have Sex To Escape (NEW)
